step_by_step_reasoning: We analyze the architecture based on the transcript chronologically: 1. User traffic arrives via Route 53 / CloudFront to an internal Route 53 instance. 2. The internal Route 53 serves as a dynamic weight distributor to split traffic between two paths: Serverless (API Gateway + Lambda) and Containerized (ECS on Fargate). 3. ECS handles standard steady-state load but has scaling latency. Lambda absorbs rapid spikes (e.g., push notifications). 4. Both compute paths perform CRUD operations against 4 backend datastores: ElastiCache, DocumentDB, RDS, and OpenSearch (Elasticsearch). 5. To enable dynamic routing, CloudWatch monitors ECS load, triggering a weight-adjusting Lambda function that updates the internal Route 53 weights via the AWS SDK.

graph.name: Zigbang Hybrid Auto-scaling Architecture with Dynamic Weighted Routing
graph.notes: Hybrid architecture using ECS on Fargate and AWS Lambda to balance cost, performance, and scaling limits. Real-time weighted routing is managed dynamically by CloudWatch and Lambda based on active compute load.

nodes.name: Zigbang App Users
nodes.notes: End users accessing real-estate information, search, and push alerts.

nodes.name: Global CDN
nodes.notes: Caches static assets and handles global request entry.

nodes.name: Internal Route 53
nodes.notes: Used for dynamic weighted traffic routing between ECS and Serverless paths.

nodes.name: API Gateway
nodes.notes: Exposes endpoints for the serverless compute path.

nodes.name: Application Lambda
nodes.notes: Scales instantly to absorb rapid traffic spikes during marketing events.

nodes.name: ECS Fargate Cluster
nodes.notes: Handles main steady-state application load cost-effectively.

nodes.name: ElastiCache (Redis)
nodes.notes: Caches transient/volatile data for high-speed query response.

nodes.name: DocumentDB
nodes.notes: Stores highly read or unstructured document data.

nodes.name: RDS Database
nodes.notes: Handles standard relational transactional CRUD workloads.

nodes.name: Elasticsearch Service
nodes.notes: Powers apartment address searches and stores application troubleshooting logs.

nodes.name: CloudWatch Monitoring
nodes.notes: Tracks ECS load metrics to evaluate scaling conditions.

nodes.name: Route 53 Weight Updater
nodes.notes: Triggered by metrics to dynamically update Route 53 weighted record sets via SDK.
